headline: Coinbase Has Grown Its Game. But the Stock Can’t Escape Bitcoin’s Orbit.
summary: Despite a plethora of new products and applications, Coinbase’s stock price still closely follows Bitcoin’s volatile path after five years on the public market.

content.title: Coinbase Has Grown Its Game. But the Stock Can’t Escape Bitcoin’s Orbit.
content.summary: Despite a plethora of new products and applications, Coinbase’s stock price still closely follows Bitcoin’s volatile path after five years on the public market.

headline: BlackRock’s Asia Private Credit Fund Sees China Borrower Default
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A BlackRock Inc. private credit fund in Asia has suffered the first default by a borrower in its portfolio after a Chinese company failed to repay a loan, according to people familiar with the matter.The delinquency occurred on April 1, after Metcold Holdings Ltd., a Shanghai-based cold-chain infrastructure service provider, failed to repay the loan’s outstanding principal of $27.5 million, said the people who requested anonymity discussing private matters. headline: BlackRock shares gain as quarterly earnings, revenue top estimates

headline: BlackRock Earnings and Revenue Beat Expectations
summary: BlackRock reported first-quarter adjusted net income of $2.07 billion, up 17% from the prior year, while assets under management rose 20% to $13.89 trillion. The New York-based asset-management firm, the world’s largest, said revenue rose 27% to $6.

content.title: BlackRock Earnings and Revenue Beat Expectations
content.summary: BlackRock reported first-quarter adjusted net income of $2.07 billion, up 17% from the prior year, while assets under management rose 20% to $13.89 trillion. The New York-based asset-management firm, the world’s largest, said revenue rose 27% to $6.

headline: BlackRock Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings

headline: Micron at $420: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) presents a compelling bull case at $420.52. Fundamentally, the argument for owning it has rarely been cleaner for a semiconductor name of this scale. With AI-driven memory demand accelerating and earnings growing at a pace that makes the current valuation look genuinely cheap, the stock deserves serious attention from investors who can ... headline: JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, BlackRock: Bank earnings takeaways

JPMorgan (JPM), Wells Fargo (WFC), Citi (C), and BlackRock (BLK) continued bank earnings week on Tuesday following Goldman Sachs' (GS) strong results on Monday.

Sevens Research Report founder Tom Essaye chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the earnings results.
